title: strychnos ndengensis
intro: Strychnos ndengensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Strychnos ndengensis lie in its ability to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant has been traditionally used to provide relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues, with its health benefits extending to its use as a treatment for malaria and other parasitic infections. Herbal preparations of Strychnos ndengensis may include infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
